chunks.title: Universal Judgment and Desolation
chunks.reason: Describes the global destruction of the earth and its inhabitants as a unified prophetic oracle.

chunks.title: Remnant Praise and Final Collapse
chunks.reason: Shifts to the remnant's praise of Yahweh before concluding with the earth's final collapse.

chunks.title: Divine Victory and Reign
chunks.reason: Concludes with Yahweh punishing heavenly and earthly rulers and establishing His reign in Zion.
